releaseNotes:
# DPX AppDock 1.0.3

Release date: 2026-06-02

Fixes in-app update reliability on Windows.

## In-app updates

- Update UI stays responsive during download and extract (close and drag work)
- Progress window is dismissed before error dialogs appear
- Unique download filenames and retries when the update zip is locked by antivirus
- Copies the package before extract to avoid file-in-use errors

## Install & update

- **Setup:** `DPX.AppDock-1.0.3-setup.exe`
- **In-app update package:** `DPX.AppDock-1.0.3-win-x64.zip`
